# Real Estate Website - MERN Stack

## Project Overview
Building a full-stack real estate website using MERN (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) with property listings, user authentication, and admin dashboard.

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file
- [ ] Scaffold the MERN project structure
- [ ] Install backend dependencies
- [ ] Install frontend dependencies
- [ ] Set up MongoDB connection
- [ ] Create backend routes and models
- [ ] Set up user authentication
- [ ] Build frontend components
- [ ] Test the application
- [ ] Update README.md

## Development Guidelines

- Use MongoDB for database
- Express.js for backend REST API
- React for frontend UI
- Node.js runtime
- JWT for authentication
- Separate client and server folders

## Project Structure
```
Real_Estate/
├── server/
│   ├── models/
│   ├── routes/
│   ├── controllers/
│   ├── middleware/
│   ├── config/
│   └── server.js
├── client/
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   ├── pages/
│   │   ├── services/
│   │   └── App.js
│   └── package.json
└── README.md
```
